title: Spec Compliance Review of Recent Commits
description: Review last 20 commits for MUST/SHOULD violations per RFC2119, deviations from spec in spec/ directory, and incorrect constants. Focus on lichen protocol implementation in rust/ and zephyr/. Create [spec-compliance] bug beads for any issues found. Priority 0 for this epic.
notes: Created spec-compliance beads: project-LICHEN-20am, project-LICHEN-nkcv, project-LICHEN-jmas, project-LICHEN-et78, project-LICHEN-f4xg, project-LICHEN-s020 from review of last 20 commits. No tests run as review-only. Follow-up fixes in those beads.
